meaning: v.戏弄,说笑n.无恶意的戏谑,玩笑
examples: I don't see that it matters what Josh thinks.
Josh bares his pointy teeth in a vicious snarl.
Josh agreed and asked, "When shall we come here again?"
She was hospitalized for four weeks because of preeclampsia with her first son, Josh.
Josh will be answering your questions and discussing this story on Facebook and Twitter.
